feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MEIS T-code taking non Material PO in report.
entry.content:
MEIS T-code taking non Material PO in report. Is there alternative report which will run for Material number PO's.

MEIS  report fetch PO with non material number where the TARE weight is 0.00.

Expecting alternative report to display Material PO where the Tare weight is more than 1KG.

entry.title: New asset created but depreciation is calculated for longer period
entry.content:
Hi,

Business created a new cloud computing asset: FA 1000024 CLM – Implementation Cost for LinkSquares. The contract term is 12/19/2025–12/18/2026, and the implementation invoice was paid in April. Business attempted to place the asset in service for 8 months so depreciation would run from May through December. However, the system is calculating depreciation over 12 months. Could someone please help adjust the depreciation schedule so it ends in December (when the contract term ends)?

I will share screenshots in the document attached. The issue is in NEP system. 

 

Regards

Kriti Palod

entry.title: 资产以前年度多折旧了，怎么冲回？
entry.content:
资产701001854，2024年资产的摊销已完成，与实际情况不符，如何处理实现把以前年度多摊销的金额冲回？

SAP版本ECC770

entry.title: Company code 6151 is not permitted as the paying company code in FBZP Config.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have developed a new company code, Q951, with reference to coco 6151 as part of a rollout project in Switzerland. We are establishing a cross-company agreement wherein the bank account in 6151 makes payments on behalf of Q951 in accordance with business requirements. For the new Coco Q951, the paying company code will be 6151. However, please be note that although both coco are from Switzerland, their functional currency is different. The currency in Coco 6151 is CHF.The currency of Coco Q951 is USD.

 

Problem: When customizing in the FBZP transaction, error F3063 occurs. After reading OSS note 2257645, we now know that in order to establish cross-company payments, both COCOs must be located in the same country and bearing the same functional currency.

 

Why this ticket: We simply wanted to know if there was another way to get around this problem and develop the cross-company payment system properly. Alternatively, if this is an unchangeable SAP standard practice.

entry.title: DMEE Transaction
entry.content:
Hello Team,

This is regarding the issue where the user needs to populate both IBAN and Bank Account values in the DMEE transaction.

Specifically, in the path:
DMEE → PmtInf → CdtTrfTxInf → CdtrAcct → Other → Id

  • The IBAN value should be populated under Other → Id (when available)
  • The Vendor Bank Account should be populated under Other → Id (if IBAN is not maintained)

However, despite trying multiple conditions as per the below configurations, we are observing that the IBAN value is still populating in the IBAN field and the Bank Account in (Other → Id), instead of correctly populating both fields as required.

Could you please assist us in guiding on how to correctly populate:

  • IBAN in the Other → Id
  • Vendor Bank Account in the Other → Id field (when IBAN is not available)

Thanks

Pooja

entry.title: use agentic ai for streamserve application
entry.content:
We would like to explore potential use cases for leveraging Agentic AI within OpenText Exstream and understand how this capability can enhance our document generation and customer communication processes.
 
We would appreciate it if you could:
Share relevant use cases where Agentic AI has been successfully implemented in OpenText Exstream or similar CCM platforms. 

Provide any available documentation, reference architectures, or best practices that can help us evaluate and design these solutions
Highlight potential integration approaches and limitations, if any.

This will help us assess feasibility and identify opportunities for further exploration and implementation.

entry.title: Cancellation of billing invoice even it is referenced to create credit memo
entry.content: User has created billing invoice, then created credit memo with reference to billing invoice after that system allows to cancel billing invoice without cancelling credit memo & note. This is the SAP standard behaviour but how we can stop this process that if any invoice has been referenced to create credit memo then system will not allow to cancel billing invoice until & unless all the document get reversed.

entry.title: Not able to close the project
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Ref: 374035/2026

while trying to replication the ABCO Transaction code, we are getting the error " Asset is investment measure, transaction type is not allowed". please find the attached screen shot for your reference and let us know we will connect and discuss on this issue.

entry.title: Cancellation of billing invoice even it is referenced to create credit memo
entry.content: User has created billing invoice, then created credit memo with reference to billing invoice after that system allows to cancel billing invoice without cancelling credit memo & note. how we can stop this process that if any invoice has been referenced to create credit memo then system will not allow to cancel billing invoice until & unless all the document get reversed.

entry.title: Issue with payment medium file download from DME
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please find attached the document for reference.

We are facing an issue where, for one company code, the payment medium file is downloading successfully. However, for another company code, the system is showing an error when attempting to download the payment medium file from the DME. The error message displayed is: “No data record found.”

Kindly review the attached test case and advise on how we can resolve this issue and successfully download the .txt file from the DME.

entry.title: Issue with Payment Medium File Download from DME
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please find attached the document for reference.

We are facing an issue where, for one company code, the payment medium file is downloading successfully. However, for another company code, the system is showing an error when attempting to download the payment medium file from the DME. The error message displayed is: “No data record found.”

Kindly review the attached test case and advise on how we can resolve this issue and successfully download the .txt file from the DME.

entry.title: Issue with Payment Medium File Download from DME
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please find attached the document for reference.

We are facing an issue where, for one company code, the payment medium file is downloading successfully. However, for another company code, the system is showing an error when attempting to download the payment medium file from the DME. The error message displayed is: “No data record found.”

Kindly review the attached test case and advise on how we can resolve this issue and successfully download the .txt file from the DME.

entry.title: IDE in VSCODE
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Would like to know the current status/update regarding SAP IDE support in VS Code.

Last year SAP shared updates about bringing ABAP Development Tools / IDE capabilities into VS Code. Could you please share:

Current availability status
Planned roadmap / GA timeline

entry.title: Significance of EXIDV field in PGI idoc
entry.content: Why does we have dependency on PGI idoc for EXIDV value, when PICK idoc already has it and alreadysaves the value in DN.

entry.title: ME59N_request input&advice if enhance ME59N for new parameter Per Material No.
entry.content:
if enhancement transaction ME59N for option "Per Material No.", in order to group same Material No. created to One PO.

Business can see the volume (qty.) of that Material for volume discounts with Supplier.

Please advise what would be concerns in term of Technical if enhance with new option "Per Material No."

entry.title: Date format is not correct when we download the document from SAP.
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We need your help on below issue  
We have created a Batch job to Download the SAP report automatically into user system every day. The batch job is working fine and it is downloading the report in the EXCEL format. But when the user opening the automatic downloaded excel document, the date format got disturbed.

It is not coming in a date format, it is appearing as just number.

So, we need your help to resolve this issue.

User is facing this issue only when the report downloaded automatically through batch job.

If the user manually downloads the document, it is working fine without any issue.

Kindly check the attachment related to issue user facing.

Thanks & Regards,
Gagana N

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM number range exclude
entry.content:
Hello Support Team,

Is it possible to exclude specific number range objects from alerting? We have certain objects that are not currently in use, but they are still triggering unnecessary alerts.

Thank you for your assistance.

Artem

entry.title: Unable to Post Asset With TT 150 with Document Type AB in Testing Environment i.e. Z02 and Z03.
entry.content: Unable to Post Asset With TT 150 with Document Type AB in Testing Environment i.e. Z02 and Z03.

entry.title: FB05 transfer posting with clearing does not update WITH_ITEM for withholding tax at payment
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am facing an issue related to Extended Withholding Tax in Brazil scenario.

Context:

  • IRF category configured as “withholding tax at payment”

  • Vendor invoice posted successfully

  • IRF information exists correctly in vendor master/customizing

  • Process uses transfer posting with clearing (FB05)

Issue:
When executing FB05 for transfer posting with clearing, the withholding tax is not recalculated and table WITH_ITEM is not updated.

System displays message:
7Q332 – “Withholding tax information is not considered”

I already checked SAP Notes explaining that:

  • FB05 / clearing transactions are generally not payment-relevant

  • WITH_ITEM is not updated in non-payment relevant events

  • Only payment-relevant processes (F110, F-53, FBZ2, FB05 incoming/outgoing payment) generate withholding tax items

However, in this case the business requirement is specifically for IRF configured “at payment”.

My questions are:

  1. Is there any standard way to force withholding tax calculation during FB05 transfer posting with clearing?

  2. Is there any BTE/BAdI/enhancement recommended by SAP for this scenario?

  3. Has anyone implemented a custom solution to generate/update WITH_ITEM during clearing?

  4. For IRF at payment, is SAP recommendation always to use payment transactions instead of clearing transactions?

Additional context:

  • Brazil localization

  • Extended Withholding Tax activated

  • ACM / contract settlement process involved

  • Custom logic currently posts accounting entries manually in POST_FI

Any guidance or best practice would be appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: Demical are prohibited in Internal Order
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

In the T.code KO02 transaction , 28782, 82 is being entered by the user in Internal Order , The user is getting the error "Demical are prohibited in Internal Order".

I have checked in User defaults  - SU01 - Decimal Notification is - 1.234.567,89.

In T.code OY04, Currency EUR is not configured or is not avilable.

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards

Sridhar
